---
name: 📇 Domain Whitelist & Removal Request
about: Request to whitelist a legitimate fan project or remove an incorrectly flagged domain from the threat list.
title: '[Removal Request] - YOUR-DOMAIN.com'
labels: ['domain-removal', 'security-review']
assignees: []

---

### 🪳 Domain Details
- **Domain Name to Review:** `example.com`
- **Current Status of the Domain:** 
  - [ ] **Valid Fan/Community Project:** Active and hosting a legitimate, benign CJP fan site, student mirror, or meme blog.
  - [ ] **Benign Repurposing:** Active but repurposed for a different, completely unrelated project (no CJP content remains).
  - [ ] **False Positive:** This domain does not host CJP content and was flagged by mistake.

### ❓ Reason for Removal / Whitelisting
*Please describe why this domain should be removed from the list:*

#### A. For Legitimate Fan & Community Projects:
- [ ] My site is a legitimate community/fan/student project.
- [ ] It does **NOT** collect sensitive personal data or login credentials.
- [ ] It is purely for creative satire, news, student advocacy, or memes supporting CJP.

#### B. For Repurposed Domains:
- [ ] I have completely removed all CJP-related branding and assets, and am running a clean, unrelated project.

### 📁 Verification & Proof
*Provide evidence so our security swarm can verify your request:*
- **Project/Domain Link:** (Link to your public website or GitHub repository, if applicable)
- **Security Declaration:** Briefly explain the nature of your site or the changes made to ensure visitor safety.

### ✅ Agreement
- [ ] I agree that if this domain is caught hosting any fraudulent content or phishing forms in the future, it will be permanently re-added to the blocklist.
